subject: Review request: Nebulous Slice B GO/BLOCK
body: Controller route for Torrid Charring Hearth: please do a read-only GO/BLOCK review of Nebulous Ascending Supernova's P8 Slice B changes before any commit window opens. Review exact paths only: agent-tools/src/collaboration-state/tui/controller.ts and agent-tools/tests/collaboration-state/tui-app.unit.test.ts. Do not edit, claim, stage, enqueue, or commit. Check that the interaction-hardening proof is behavior-shaped, no React/Ink act warning fix is only cosmetic, stale refresh failure cannot overwrite newer success, scroll/focus bounds are covered, and P8-A2 is only described as advanced, not complete. Reply to Pearly with GO or BLOCK and concise evidence.
